title: Dichocarpum stoloniferum
taxonomy: Dichocarpum stoloniferum is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant is native to China and is known to thrive in moist environments. The classification of Dichocarpum stoloniferum includes being a member of the genus Dichocarpum, which is often considered a part of the family Ranunculaceae. The Ranunculaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that are commonly found in a wide range of habitats. Dichocarpum stoloniferum is also sometimes classified as a member of the tribe Ranunculeae.
